parameters.query:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        XEVDR.XNUM_0          AS num_dossier,
        XEVDR.XDAT_0          AS date_document,
        XEVDR.XSAL_0          AS num_candidat,
        XEVDR.XPOST_0         AS poste_a_pourvoir,
        XEVDR.XCOM_0          AS commentaire,
        XEVDR.CREDATTIM_0     AS date_creation,
        XEVDR.YDATCON_0       AS date_controle,
        XEVDR.CREUSR_0        AS user_createur,

        -- Infos candidat
        XSAL.XNAMSAL_0        AS nom_candidat,
        XSAL.XPRENOM_0        AS prenom_candidat,
        XSAL.XEMAIL_0         AS email_candidat,
        XSAL.YTELE_0          AS tel_candidat,

        -- Infos créateur (résolution via YSALAUS)
        YSALAUS.XSAL_0        AS code_createur,
        CRE.XNAMSAL_0         AS nom_createur,
        CRE.XPRENOM_0         AS prenom_createur,
        CRE.XEMAIL_0          AS email_createur,
        CRE.YTELE_0           AS tel_createur,
        CRE.YSUP_0            AS code_sup_createur,

        -- Infos supérieur hiérarchique du créateur
        SUP.XSAL_0            AS code_superieur,
        SUP.XNAMSAL_0         AS nom_superieur,
        SUP.XPRENOM_0         AS prenom_superieur,
        SUP.XEMAIL_0          AS email_superieur,
        SUP.YTELE_0           AS tel_superieur,

        -- Responsables fixes
        pdg.XSAL_0            AS code_pdg,
        pdg.XNAMSAL_0         AS nom_pdg,
        pdg.XPRENOM_0         AS prenom_pdg,
        pdg.XEMAIL_0          AS email_pdg,
        pdg.YTELE_0           AS tel_pdg,

        dga.XSAL_0            AS code_dga,
        dga.XNAMSAL_0         AS nom_dga,
        dga.XPRENOM_0         AS prenom_dga,
        dga.XEMAIL_0          AS email_dga,
        dga.YTELE_0           AS tel_dga,

        farhat.XSAL_0         AS code_farhat,
        farhat.XNAMSAL_0      AS nom_farhat,
        farhat.XPRENOM_0      AS prenom_farhat,
        farhat.XEMAIL_0       AS email_farhat,
        farhat.YTELE_0        AS tel_farhat,

        baallah.XSAL_0        AS code_baallah,
        baallah.XNAMSAL_0     AS nom_baallah,
        baallah.XPRENOM_0     AS prenom_baallah,
        baallah.XEMAIL_0      AS email_baallah,
        baallah.YTELE_0       AS tel_baallah,

        -- ═══ INFOS TELEGRAM ═══
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = YSALAUS.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_createur,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = YSALAUS.XSAL_0) AS langue_createur,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = YSALAUS.XSAL_0) AS bot_createur,

        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = SUP.XSAL_0)     AS chat_id_superieur,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = SUP.XSAL_0)     AS langue_superieur,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = SUP.XSAL_0)     AS bot_superieur,

        '8528101210'           AS chat_id_pdg,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.XSAL_0)     AS langue_pdg,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.XSAL_0)     AS bot_pdg,

        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0)     AS chat_id_dga,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0)     AS langue_dga,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0)     AS bot_dga,

        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0)  AS chat_id_farhat,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0)  AS langue_farhat,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0)  AS bot_farhat,

        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_baallah,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS langue_baallah,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS bot_baallah,

        -- ═══ DÉLAI & CALCULS ═══
        CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT) AS delai_int,
        CASE
            WHEN XEVDR.YDATCON_0 != '1753-01-01' THEN XEVDR.YDATCON_0
            ELSE DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), XEVDR.CREDATTIM_0)
        END AS date_limite,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, XEVDR.CREDATTIM_0, GETDATE()) AS jours_depuis_creation,
        CASE
            WHEN XEVDR.YDATCON_0 != '1753-01-01'
                THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), XEVDR.YDATCON_0)
            ELSE
                DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), XEVDR.CREDATTIM_0))
        END AS jours_restants,
        CASE
            WHEN XEVDR.YDATCON_0 != '1753-01-01'
                THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, XEVDR.CREDATTIM_0, XEVDR.YDATCON_0) / 2
            ELSE
                CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT) / 2
        END AS seuil_dga

    FROM [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[XEVDR] XEVDR

    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL XSAL
        ON XSAL.XSAL_0 = XEVDR.XSAL_0

    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.YSALAUS YSALAUS
        ON YSALAUS.USER_0 = XEVDR.CREUSR_0

    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL CRE
        ON CRE.XSAL_0 = YSALAUS.XSAL_0

    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL SUP
        ON SUP.XSAL_0 = CRE.YSUP_0

    OUTER APPLY (
        SELECT TOP 1 VALEUR_0
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.ADOVAL
        WHERE PARAM_0 = 'YDELXEVDR'
    ) P

    OUTER APPLY (
        SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0066'
    ) pdg

    OUTER APPLY (
        SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0949'
    ) dga

    OUTER APPLY (
        SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S1602'
    ) farhat

    OUTER APPLY (
        SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0, XNAMSAL_0, XPRENOM_0, XEMAIL_0, YTELE_0
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0179'
    ) baallah

    WHERE
        NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[AOBJTXT] AOBJTXT
            WHERE XEVDR.XNUM_0 = AOBJTXT.IDENT1_0
              AND AOBJTXT.ABREV_0 = 'XEVDR'
        )
        AND CAST(XEVDR.CREDATTIM_0 AS DATE) >= '2024-01-01'
)

SELECT *, 'SALARIE'   AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants = 4
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'SUPERIEUR' AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants = 3
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'FARHAT'    AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= 8  AND jours_restants > 4
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'BAALLAH'   AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= seuil_dga AND jours_restants > 8
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'DGA'       AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= seuil_dga AND jours_restants > 4
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'PDG'       AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= 2
ORDER BY jours_restants ASC

nodes.notes: Stoppe si aucune évaluation à traiter
